raw:
ISSUES:
- [severity:info] COMM_OFCIAL_DOC.jsp:648 - The fixed 2000ms delay for `window.print()` is a heuristic that may fail to capture high-resolution signature stamps or large images if network latency is high.
- [severity:info] COMM_OFCIAL_DOC.jsp:646 - Using `localStorage` for the print trigger is shared across all browser tabs of the same origin; a URL parameter (e.g., `?autoPrint=Y`) would be more reliable and isolated for users opening multiple document previews simultaneously.

VERDICT: looks-good
SUMMARY: The changes effectively resolve document clipping issues during printing by transitioning from fixed viewport heights to auto-height, and implement a convenient auto-print trigger for the preview page.

issues.text: COMM_OFCIAL_DOC.jsp:648 - The fixed 2000ms delay for `window.print()` is a heuristic that may fail to capture high-resolution signature stamps or large images if network latency is high.

COMM_OFCIAL_DOC.jsp:646 - Using `localStorage` for the print trigger is shared across all browser tabs of the same origin; a URL parameter (e.g., `?autoPrint=Y`) would be more reliable and isolated for users opening multiple document previews simultaneously.

summary: The changes effectively resolve document clipping issues during printing by transitioning from fixed viewport heights to auto-height, and implement a convenient auto-print trigger for the preview page.
